title: Compose an effect program and run it once
description: Build a side-effecting workflow as composed IO/Future values and execute it only at the boundary.
body: Steps: 1. Wrap each side effect (DB call, HTTP, file IO) in an IO/Task so it is a value. 2. Compose them with for-comprehensions/flatMap into one program, threading errors via the effect's error channel. 3. Add resource safety (Resource/bracket) so acquisition releases on failure. 4. Keep the body pure; perform no unsafe run until the top. 5. Run once via IOApp/unsafeRunSync at the edge. Rollback point: before changing where the program is run. Validation: a test asserts no effect fires on construction and that running yields the expected result and releases resources even on failure.
